description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden house with a simple rectangular structure and a steep gable roof covered in gray, fish-scale shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontally arranged, weathered wooden planks, giving it a traditional, aged appearance. A single chimney protrudes from the roof, constructed from the same weathered wood as the rest of the house. The front facade features a basic wooden door and a single window with a plain frame, both set asymmetrically. The house sits on a flat, tan-colored base, with a small wooden step leading up to the entryway. There are no visible decorative elements, porches, or additional architectural flourishes, emphasizing its utilitarian and rural character.
description: A small, rustic wooden house with a steep gray shingle roof, weathered plank walls, a single chimney, and a simple door and window on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the weathered wooden planks, the steep shingle roof, and the chimney; no windows or doors are visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entry door, a single window, the step, and the gable roof with chimney visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the chimney visible on the roof and no windows or doors present.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the wooden plank wall and the gable roof with chimney, with no windows or doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with a single step, no porch or decorative elements
